data.title: Barnes & Noble Education filed to sell 19.28M shares of common stock for holders
data.description:
• Barnes & Noble Education (NYSE:BNED) filed a prospectus related to the offer and sale of up to 19,276,512 shares of common stock by the selling stockholders.
  • This prospectus is not an offer to sell.
  • Filing

data.title: West Fraser Timber GAAP EPS of -$1.03 misses by $0.14, revenue of $1.44B beats by $50M
data.description:
• West Fraser Timber press release (NYSE:WFG): Q3 GAAP EPS of -$1.03 misses by $0.14.
  • Revenue of $1.44B (-15.8% Y/Y) beats by $50M.
  • Adjusted EBITDA1 of $62 million, representing 4% of sales
  • Lumber segment Adjusted EBITDA1 of $(62) million, including $32 million of export duty expense attributable to the finalization of AR5
  • North America Engineered Wood Products ("NA EWP") segment Adjusted EBITDA1 of $121 million
  • Pulp & Paper segment Adjusted EBITDA1 of $2 million
  • Europe Engineered Wood Products ("Europe EWP") segment Adjusted EBITDA1 of $1 million
  • Repurchased 446,460 shares for aggregate consideration of $35 million
  • Announced indefinite curtailment of operations at lumber mill in Lake Butler, Florida
  • Subsequent to quarter-end, repaid principal and accrued interest on $300 million senior notes on maturity with cash on hand.

data.title: SPI Energy announces receipt of Nasdaq delist determination notice
data.description:
• SPI Energy (NASDAQ:SPI) on Wednesday said it has received a letter from Nasdaq, saying that as the company had not regained compliance with listing rules within the period as prescribed by the staff, its securities will be delisted from Nasdaq.
  • Separately, the letter also noted that the company did not meet the terms of the exception for demonstrating compliance with the listing rule, which requires the timely filing of all required periodic reports with the SEC.
  • The letter notified the company that it may appeal the Staff's determination to the Panel by October 22. The company has accordingly submitted a request for hearing before the panel.
  • SPI -0.62% after hours to $0.4431.
  • Source: Press Release
